title: From Install to Immersion
subtitle: A simple, private workflow to keep your desktop alive.

step1.title: Install & Launch
step1.description: Download the app and start from the menu bar.

step2.title: Import Bundles
step2.description: Bring in local video or scene bundles in one click.

step3.title: Assign Screens
step3.description: Choose which wallpaper plays on each display.

step4.title: Tune Playback
step4.description: Adjust fill mode, volume, and pause rules.

step5.title: Enjoy & Sleep
step5.description: Keep the motion running, even in screen saver mode.

gallery.title: Local collections previewed in one unified library
gallery.caption: Bundles stay private, stored and played directly on your Mac
gallery.imageAlt: Storyboard-style preview grid of local wallpaper bundles
